sections.text:
(1)TheRegistrar, everyDeputy Registrarand every magistrate shall beex officioa Commissioner for Oaths.
TheRegistrar, everyDeputy Registrarand every magistrate shall beex officioa Commissioner for Oaths.
(2)The Chief Justice may, from time to time, byGazettenotice, appoint other persons to be Commissioners for Oaths, and may in the same manner revoke any such appointment.[As amended by No. 51 of 1951 and G.N. No. 303 of 1964]
